bead.title: feat: implement BYOC observation credential issuance
bead.description:
Implement POST /tenants/{id}/observation-credentials on the control-plane HTTP API.

The ObservationCredential model (model.rs) and shape tests (byoc_safety_proof.rs) were written in axon-a602f905. This bead implements the issuance endpoint.

Requirements:
- POST /tenants/{id}/observation-credentials issues a short-lived credential with TTL ≤ 24h.
- Credentials expire after expires_at_ms; the API rejects expired credentials on use.
- Scope is caller-specified: health_only or metrics_read.
- Issued credentials are stored in the control-plane store (new ControlPlaneStore method).
- A DELETE /tenants/{id}/observation-credentials/{cred-id} endpoint revokes a credential.

In-scope: model update (already done), store trait extension, service layer, HTTP handler, tests.
Out-of-scope: credential propagation to tenant instances (requires ADR update).
bead.acceptance:
1. POST /tenants/{id}/observation-credentials returns a 201 with an ObservationCredential whose ttl_ms() <= 24h.
2. A credential with expires_at_ms in the past is rejected with 401 credential_expired.
3. DELETE /tenants/{id}/observation-credentials/{cred-id} removes the credential from the store.
4. cargo test -p axon-control-plane passes with no clippy warnings.
